title: Create Dependent Drop-down Lists with Conditional Data Validation
excerpt:
I need assistance creating conditional formatting that does not result in extra columns.

posts.author: mhelwer (Morgan Helwer)
posts.cookedHtml:
I need assistance creating conditional formatting that does not result in extra columns.

For example, in column “A” if I select option B, then only C,D,E populate in the next column as selections. However, in column “A”, if I select F then only G,H,I populate in the column but does not create additional blank columns.

posts.author: oasclay (clay)
posts.cookedHtml: i currently have the same issue. did you ever figure out a workaround? monday.com hasn’t seemed to address this specific issue even though it appears to be recurring over the years…
